title: Linear Models, Regression, and Systems · Quantity Clinic: System Matrices
summary: Allocate staff and supplies under multiple linear constraints. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math int system matrices increment in a linear allocation and scenario model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Represent and solve systems with augmented matrices and row operations.
Solve linear systems and classify unique, absent, and infinite solutions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
